title: Sunken Trinkets
description:
70+ Unlockable trinkets with different useful abilities.

Sunken Trinkets is a fork & continuation of the Lost Trinkets mod from owmii.
body:
*Sunken Trinkets* is a fork & continuation of the *Lost Trinkets* mod from owmii. --- This mod adds over 70 unlockable trinkets, each with different abilities and rarities. - How do I unlock trinkets?
Trinkets unlock randomly when you do various activities like fighting monsters and bosses, trading, mining ores, cutting trees or farming. Some activities have a higher change of unlocking tinkets with higher rarity, eg: killing bosses has a better chance than normal enemies. (See Config for more info). - How to open the trinkets UI?
By default, the trinket management UI is bound to the R key on your keyboard (changeable ingame). - Right clicking into the air for magneto is unpracticable, is there another way for using it?
You can bind a key to trigger magneto's effect in the settings. If you set it, it automatically disables the ability to trigger it with a right click into the air too!
